es.name: Ley de Snell
es.description: Calcula el ГЎngulo de refracciГіn entre dos medios.
es.seo_title: Ley de Snell Gratuita вЂ“ FГЎcil y Gratis
es.seo_description: Calcula el ГЎngulo de refracciГіn entre dos medios. Calculadora gratuita, precisa e instantГЎnea. Con manejo de fechas y zonas horarias.
es.example_label: Find the refraction angle when light enters glass (n=1.5) from air at 45В°.
es.result_context: The refraction angle {theta2} degrees is the angle of the light ray in the second medium.
es.formula_display: nГўГўв‚¬ЕЎВЃ Г— sin(ОёГўГўв‚¬ЕЎВЃ) = nГўГўв‚¬ЕЎГўв‚¬ЕЎ Г— sin(ОёГўГўв‚¬ЕЎГўв‚¬ЕЎ)  ГўГўв‚¬В вЂ™  ОёГўГўв‚¬ЕЎГўв‚¬ЕЎ = arcsin((nГўГўв‚¬ЕЎВЃ Г— sin(ОёГўГўв‚¬ЕЎВЃ)) Г· nГўГўв‚¬ЕЎГўв‚¬ЕЎ)
steps: nГўГўв‚¬ЕЎВЃ = 1.0 (air), ОёГўГўв‚¬ЕЎВЃ = 45В°, nГўГўв‚¬ЕЎГўв‚¬ЕЎ = 1.5 (glass)
Calculate sin(45В°) в‰€ 0.7071
Apply Snell's law: sin(Оёв‚‚) = (1.0 Г— 0.7071) Г· 1.5 = 0.4714
Find Оёв‚‚ = arcsin(0.4714) в‰€ 28.1255В°
mistakes: Using degrees in sine function without radian conversion
Not checking for total internal reflection condition
Swapping n1 and n2 in the formula

input_type_review.reason: Correct - refractive index is dimensionless ratio
